summary: Tested 7 bug fixes: Did Not Trade date comparison, Reset Tracker simulation support, Merin iframe responsiveness, Lysha onboarding data reload, Mobile sticky signal LOT/Exit display, Mobile disclaimer overlap, Trade History current month filter with Past Trades button. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 bugs verified fixed: 1) Did Not Trade uses regex prefix matching for date comparison. 2) Reset Tracker passes user_id when simulating member. 3) Merin iframe uses absolute positioning with h-full. 4) Onboarding awaits loadData with 500ms delay. 5) Mobile sticky signal shows LOT, Exit, Time. 6) Mobile spacer increased to h-16. 7) Trade History defaults to current_month_only=true with Past Trades button linking to /profit-tracker.

did_not_trade_date_comparison.fix: Uses regex prefix matching ($regex: ^{date_str}) instead of exact date comparison

reset_tracker_simulation.fix: Reset endpoint accepts optional user_id parameter, frontend passes simulatedView.memberId

merin_iframe_responsive.fix: Iframe uses absolute inset-0 w-full h-full to fill card

onboarding_data_reload.fix: Awaits loadData() with 500ms delay after onboarding completion

mobile_sticky_signal.fix: Shows LOT size, Exit value, and Time in sticky bar

mobile_disclaimer_overlap.fix: Spacer increased to h-16 to prevent content overlap

trade_history_current_month.fix: Defaults to current_month_only=true, shows month label and Past Trades button
